channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cohere's European Expansion Signals Growth of AI Powers Outside US and China
item.description: Cohere's partnership with German-backed Aleph Alpha points to a growing bloc of AI companies positioning themselves between dominant US and Chinese players.

item.title: Oil Analyst Warns of Prolonged Market Disruption Regardless of Strait of Hormuz Outcome
item.description: A leading oil analyst said conditions will continue to deteriorate over the coming months regardless of whether the Strait of Hormuz reopens.

item.title: Data Centers Pairing Batteries with Gas Generators to Manage AI Power Demands
item.description: As AI increases strain on the electrical grid, data center operators are combining battery storage with natural gas generators to maintain reliable power supply.

item.title: Ford CEO Warns American Automakers Face a Compounding Set of Industry Pressures
item.description: Ford CEO Jim Farley said the company must make the right strategic bets to remain viable, describing the current environment as a defining challenge for US automakers.

item.title: Meta CTO Says He Experiences Significant Stress Only About Five Times a Year
item.description: Meta CTO Andrew Bosworth describes his stress triggers as high-stakes decision-making moments, and says physical exercise is his primary method of managing pressure.
